price: Wenn Er will, läßt Er euch vergehen und bringt eine neue Schöpfung.
arabic: إِن يَشَأۡ يُذۡهِبۡكُمۡ وَيَأۡتِ بِخَلۡقٖ جَدِيدٖ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: in yasha yudh'hib'kum wayati bikhalqin jadīdin
